title: pilea peltata var. ovatifolia
intro: Pilea peltata var. ovatifolia, also known as Chinese lettuce or Pilea, is a type of flowering plant in the Urticaceae family, native to China. This plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antiviral effects, which can help to alleviate symptoms of fever, cough, and skin infections. The health benefits of Pilea peltata var. ovatifolia include its ability to boost the immune system, reduce inflammation, and exhibit antioxidant properties, making it a potential natural remedy for various health conditions. Pilea peltata var. ovatifolia can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infusion, and its leaves and stems are also edible and can be used as a salad green.
